DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF'S DENNIS ANDAYA, MARY BACIGALUPI, WILLIAM BLACK, DENISE CASTRO & KEVIN FONG'S MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO POST JUDGMENT DISCOVERY IS GRANTED, FOR REASONS SET FORTH IN PLAINTIFF MOVING PARTY'S PAPERS; DEFENDANT DIVERSIFIED INVESTMENT AND MANAGEMENT COMPANY DOES NOT OPPOSE THE MOTION AND HAS NOT PROVIDED ANY RESPONSE TO THE POST-JUDGMENT INTERROGATORIES AND REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE RESPONSES WITHOUT OBJECTIONS WITHIN 30 DAYS. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $885, GIVEN NO REPLY PAPERS AND ASSUMING NO HEARING. ORDER SIGNED. KATHERINE HUIBONHOA, JUDGE PRO-TEM, JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, CLERK, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Post Judgment Discovery
Off Calendar Mar-04-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Allison Roades-Brown, 415.215.5378, appearing for the Plaintiff;
No appearance by any party or counsel.

The tentative ruling is adopted. PLAINTIFF'S DENNIS ANDAYA, MARY BACIGALUPI, WILLIAM BLACK, DENISE CASTRO & KEVIN FONG'S Motion To Compel Further Responses To Post Judgment Discovery is GRANTED, for reasons set forth in plaintiff moving party's papers; defendant Diversified Investment and Management Company does not oppose the motion and has not provided any response to the post-judgment interrogatories and requests for production. Defendant is ordered to provide responses without objections within 30 days. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is granted in the amount of $885, given no reply papers and assuming no hearing. Order signed. Katherine Huibonhoa, Judge Pro-Tem, Jacqueline Alameda, Clerk, Not Reported. =(302/JPT)
